name: Spicy Cucumber Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons sesame paste or peanut butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Broil chicken, turning once until completely cooked but still tender. Remove skin and chop into bite-size pieces.
2. Place cucumbers on serving plates and top with chicken.
3. Soak peppercorns in hot water. Drain and combine with remaining dressing ingredients until well blended. Pour dressing over chicken and serve.
4. Cucumber and chicken can be chilled in advance or served at room temperature.
